info.title: BrushFit AgentStore API
info.description: API for discovering and purchasing BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide. A 31-page PDF with 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises you do while brushing your teeth. Supports x402 protocol (USDC on Base blockchain) and Stripe (card) payments. Agent discovery via /agents.json, /.well-known/mcp.json, /.well-known/agent-protocol.json, /llms.txt, and /.well-known/ai-plugin.json.

get.description: Returns full product details, pricing, payment methods, and purchase instructions for the BrushFit guide. This is the primary discovery endpoint for AI agents. Response includes product name, price ($19.99 USD), format (PDF, 31 pages), description, exercise categories, payment methods (x402 and Stripe), free sample URL, and links to OpenAPI spec and AI plugin manifest.
get.x-agent-hint: Call this endpoint first to discover what is available and how to purchase.

200.description: Product information including pricing, payment methods, and purchase instructions

get.summary: Purchase BrushFit PDF via x402 protocol (USDC on Base)
get.description: Initiates the x402 payment flow. First request returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements (price, currency, network, recipient address). After signing a USDC transfer authorization on Base blockchain (chain ID 8453), retry the same endpoint with the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header to receive the PDF. Recommended: use @x402/fetch wrapFetchWithPayment() to automate the entire flow.
get.x-agent-hint: This endpoint returns HTTP 402 on first call — that is expected, not an error. Parse the 402 response for payment details, sign a USDC transfer, then retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header.

parameters.name: PAYMENT-SIGNATURE
parameters.description: Signed USDC transfer authorization for x402 payment. Omit on first request to receive payment requirements.

200.description: PDF file delivered after successful x402 payment verification

402.description: Payment required — response body contains payment requirements including price, currency (USDC), network (Base), and recipient address. This is the expected first response in the x402 flow.

post.summary: Create a Stripe checkout session for card payment ($19.99 USD)
post.description: Creates a Stripe checkout session and returns a redirect URL for card-based payment. Price: $19.99 USD. After successful payment, the user is redirected to a success page with a download link. This endpoint is designed for human customers; AI agents should prefer the x402 protocol at /api/x402/purchase.
post.x-agent-hint: For AI agents, prefer /api/x402/purchase instead. This endpoint is designed for human customers using credit/debit cards.

url.description: Stripe-hosted checkout URL — redirect the user to this URL to complete card payment

503.description: Stripe not configured — use x402 payment method instead

get.summary: Download purchased PDF with a download token
get.description: Download the BrushFit PDF using a token received after Stripe payment. Tokens are valid for 24 hours with up to 5 downloads. This endpoint is used after Stripe checkout completion.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Download token received from Stripe checkout success redirect

403.description: Invalid, expired, or exhausted download token

get.summary: Download free BrushFit sample PDF (Legs + Core exercises)
get.description: Free preview of the BrushFit guide containing the Legs and Core exercise sections. No payment or authentication required. Use this to evaluate the product before purchasing. The sample includes 10 of the 22 exercises with full illustrations.
get.x-agent-hint: No payment needed. Download this first to evaluate the product quality before recommending purchase.

200.description: Free sample PDF file with Legs and Core exercise sections

ProductInfo.description: Complete product information for the BrushFit guide, including pricing, payment methods, and purchase instructions.

product.description: Product name: BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide

network.description: Blockchain network for x402 payment (Base, chain ID 8453)

includes.description: List of features included in the product

free_sample.description: URL to download the free sample PDF

payment_methods.description: Available payment methods with endpoints and instructions

x402.description: x402 protocol payment — USDC on Base blockchain. Preferred method for AI agents.

stripe.description: Stripe checkout — credit/debit card payment. Preferred method for human customers.

tags.name: discovery
tags.description: Product discovery and information endpoints. Start here to learn what is available.

tags.name: purchase
tags.description: Payment and download endpoints. Use x402 for programmatic agent purchases, Stripe for card payments.
